items.title: Masked Visual Actions for Unified World Modeling
items.summary: Video models absorb rich priors over how the visual world moves, interacts, and responds to contact, making them promising substrates for robotic world modeling. The central challenge is how to communicate action to such models in a form aligned with the visual space in which the
items.titleZh: 用于统一世界建模的掩码视觉动作
items.summaryZh: 视频模型吸收了关于视觉世界如何运动、交互和响应接触的丰富先验，使其成为机器人世界建模的有前景的基础。核心挑战是如何以与视觉空间对齐的形式向这些模型传达动作。

items.title: Language model harnesses are compositional generalizers
items.summary: Harnesses can lead to compositional generalization: we observe a property in training RLMs, in which similarly structured tasks are viewed as isomorphic and all individual LM calls in the harness become in-distribution.
items.titleZh: 语言模型的Harnesses具备组合泛化能力
items.summaryZh: Harnesses可以实现组合泛化：我们在训练RLM时观察到一种性质，即结构相似的任务被视为同构，harness中的所有单独语言模型调用都变为分布内。

items.title: LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks
items.summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) on open-ended tasks compresses an LLM's rubric-based evaluation into a scalar reward, discarding rich textual feedback and conflating responses with distinct quality profiles. We propose Experiential Learning (EL), which repurposes the feedback model f
items.titleZh: LLM作为教练：非可验证任务的体验式学习
items.summaryZh: 强化学习（RL）在开放式任务中将基于规则的LLM评估压缩为标量奖励，丢失丰富文本反馈并混淆不同质量的响应。我们提出体验式学习（EL），重新利用反馈模型f。

items.title: Mage-Flow: An Efficient Native-Resolution Foundation Model for Image Generation and Editing
items.summary: Large-scale visual generators are increasingly capable but costly to train, fine-tune, and deploy. We introduce Mage-Flow, a compact 4B-scale generative stack for efficient text-to-image generation and instruction-based image editing. The stack is built from two co-designed compo
items.titleZh: Mage-Flow：一种高效的原生分辨率图像生成与编辑基础模型
items.summaryZh: 大型视觉生成器能力日益增强，但训练、微调和部署成本高昂。我们介绍了Mage-Flow，一个紧凑的40亿参数级生成堆栈，用于高效的文本到图像生成和基于指令的图像编辑。该堆栈由两个协同设计的组件构建。

items.title: ABot-World-0: Infinite Interactive World Rollout on a Single Desktop GPU
items.summary: We present ABot-World-0, an action-conditioned video world model for real-time, long-horizon closed-loop interaction, supported by a multi-source data infrastructure spanning AAA games, simulation engines, and internet videos to learn controllable world dynamics. WorldExplorer pe
items.titleZh: ABot-World-0：单台桌面GPU上的无限交互式世界展开
items.summaryZh: 我们提出了ABot-World-0，一种基于动作条件的视频世界模型，支持实时、长时域闭环交互，依托涵盖AAA游戏、模拟引擎和互联网视频的多源数据基础设施，学习可控的世界动态。WorldExplorer提供支持。

items.summaryZh: 一款拥有1180亿参数和80亿专家混合模型，在长时域智能体基准测试中表现超越同类。

items.title: Agentic Real2Sim: Physics-based World Modeling with Vision-Language Agents
items.summary: Real-to-sim conversion for robotic interaction with objects remains labor-intensive because it requires more than visual reconstruction: a streamlined real2sim process must recover scene geometries and object states, infer physical parameters, and assemble actors, objects, camera
items.titleZh: Agentic Real2Sim：基于物理的视觉语言智能体世界建模
items.summaryZh: 机器人与物体交互的真实到模拟转换仍然劳动密集，因为它不仅需要视觉重建：一个简化的real2sim流程必须恢复场景几何和物体状态，推断物理参数，并组装演员、物体和摄像机。

items.title: Measuring Reward-Seeking via Contrastive Belief Updates
items.summary: Language models trained with reinforcement learning may learn to optimize the grader’s judgment rather than the intended objective. This “reward-seeking” is difficult to measure because a model that pursues the grader’s judgment and one that pursues the intended objective behave
items.titleZh: 通过对比信念更新测量奖励追求行为
items.summaryZh: 用强化学习训练的语言模型可能学会优化评分者的判断而非预期目标。这种“奖励追求”难以测量，因为追求评分者判断的模型和追求预期目标的模型行为相似。

items.title: FlowMimic: Mask-free Visual Editing and Generation with Pixel-pair Warped Flow Field for Online Video Editing Data Generation and Modality Mimicry
items.summary: In line with the prevailing direction of vision research, we explore the integration of both generation and editing capabilities for video and image modalities within a single model. Current approaches to collecting video editing data typically depend on labour-intensive, time-co
items.titleZh: FlowMimic：基于像素对扭曲流场的无掩码视觉编辑与生成，用于在线视频编辑数据生成与模态模仿
items.summaryZh: 顺应视觉研究主流方向，我们探索在单一模型中整合视频和图像模态的生成与编辑能力。当前视频编辑数据收集方法通常依赖劳动密集且耗时的过程。

items.title: OmniReasoner: Thinking with Long Audio-Video via Native Tool Use
items.summary: Long audio-video reasoning is difficult for omnimodal LLMs because the decisive evidence is often sparse, cross-modal, and too expensive to preserve with uniformly high-fidelity inputs. We introduce OmniReasoner, a tool-use post-training framework for Thinking with Long Audio-Vid
items.titleZh: OmniReasoner：通过原生工具使用进行长音视频推理
items.summaryZh: 长音视频推理对全模态大语言模型（LLM）来说很难，因为决定性证据通常稀疏、跨模态且保存高保真输入代价高。我们引入OmniReasoner，一种用于长音视频推理的工具使用后训练框架。

items.titleZh: 潜意识时钟：扩散语言模型中的潜在时间建模

items.titleZh: 转录策略作为潜变量：通过词级时间激活可控逐字ASR

items.titleZh: 优化器状态应存放何处？分层状态分配实现混合专家训练的内存高效

items.summary: LLM agent failures are difficult to debug because the step where an error surfaces is often not the one that caused it. Existing observability tools replay execution traces but provide little support for identifying the root cause or translating diagnosis into recovery. We presen
